<!-- Thanks for contributing! Keep PRs focused on one logical change. -->

## What & why

<!-- What does this change and why? Link any related issue: "Fixes #123" -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Docs / tests / tooling
- [ ] Refactor (no behaviour change)

## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff check .` passes
- [ ] `pytest` passes
- [ ] Added/updated tests for changed `core/` behaviour
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` (Unreleased) for user-visible changes
- [ ] Docstrings updated where public functions changed
